    Method to check if there exists an adjace ncy between two countries
    checkAllTags(String) - Method in class com.risk.services.MapValidate
    Method for checking whether all the attributes are present in a map file or not, these attributes are mapTag data, continents and territories.
    checkAndFindStrongestIfNoAdjacentCountryToAttack(List<Country>) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.Aggressive
    Method to check and find the strongest country if no adjacent country to attack.
    checkAndFindWeakestIfNoAdjacentCountryToFortify(List<Country>) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.Benevolent
    Method to check and find the weakest country if no adjacent country to fortify.

    Method for checking if the map is valid or not, then uploading it to play the tournament

    This method helps to provide checkboxes using Java FXML

    Method for verifying if the adjacent countries in the game are also adjacent according to the .map file.

    Check if attacker has sufficient number of armies
    checkMinimumCountriesInContinent() - Method in class com.risk.services.MapEditor
    Method for verifying if every continent has at least two countries.

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.risk.view.LaunchGameDriver

    This MapGraph class contains all the methods to add , remove countries , continents and also to add , delete edges between countries.
